responses.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Partially utilized since the reference JSON is largely a template placeholder for the live stream transcript. 2. JSON Usage: The audio and visual cues from the video were fully utilized to manually transcribe and translate the spoken dialogue, including the rapid chants and Japanese speech from Cecilia and Gigi. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles were synchronized precisely to vocal activations. Aggressive end-time truncation and instantaneous transitions were applied to handle the rapid chant sections and fast-paced banter. Zero subtitles were outputted during the instrumental dance segment.

subtitles.original: Take our hands, let's fly away!
subtitles.english: Take our hands, let's fly away!

subtitles.original: Turn around and let us play!
subtitles.english: Turn around and let us play!

subtitles.original: Find just one condition, come on!
subtitles.english: Find just one condition, come on!

subtitles.original: My butt's too big for this seat!
subtitles.english: My butt's too big for this seat!

subtitles.original: Wow, look at it! It's so big and juicy! How impressive!
subtitles.english: Wow, look at it! It's so big and juicy! How impressive!

subtitles.original: Well, L.A., we wanted to do some L.A. call-and-response.
subtitles.english: Well, L.A., we wanted to do some L.A. call-and-response.

subtitles.original: So I'm gonna say something, and you cheer if you like it, okay?
subtitles.english: So I'm gonna say something, and you cheer if you like it, okay?

subtitles.original: Okay, everybody, excited to be here at Hololive...
subtitles.english: Okay, everybody, excited to be here at Hololive...

subtitles.original: Please all stand. It is the Fourth of July weekend. For the flag...
subtitles.english: Please all stand. It is the Fourth of July weekend. For the flag...

subtitles.original: Okay, okay, okay, shut up, shut up! That's enough, enough.
subtitles.english: Okay, okay, okay, shut up, shut up! That's enough, enough.

subtitles.original: Enough of that. Enough of that shit. Okay.
subtitles.english: Enough of that. Enough of that shit. Okay.

subtitles.original: How about we do a CCGG chant?
subtitles.english: How about we do a CCGG chant?

subtitles.original: Oh, no, no, no, not yet, not yet, not yet!
subtitles.english: Oh, no, no, no, not yet, not yet, not yet!

subtitles.original: Not yet! USA is not yet! No, no, no, no.
subtitles.english: Not yet! USA is not yet! No, no, no, no.

subtitles.original: Okay guys, since you are standing, we want you to do our chant of our chorus plus...
subtitles.english: Okay guys, since you are standing, we want you to do our chant of our chorus plus...

subtitles.original: Okay, so the left side, we want them to be green.
subtitles.english: Okay, so the left side, we want them to be green.

subtitles.original: CC! GG! CC! GG! CC! GG! Madness!
subtitles.english: CC! GG! CC! GG! CC! GG! Madness!

subtitles.original: CC! GG! CC! GG! CC! GG! AutoThrust!
subtitles.english: CC! GG! CC! GG! CC! GG! AutoThrust!

subtitles.original: CC! GG! CC! GG! CC! GG! Madness!
subtitles.english: CC! GG! CC! GG! CC! GG! Madness!

subtitles.original: CC! GG! CC! GG! Come let's play!
subtitles.english: CC! GG! CC! GG! Come let's play!

subtitles.original: Are you ready? Are you ready?
subtitles.english: Are you ready? Are you ready?

subtitles.original: CCGG CCGG CCGG Come let's play!
subtitles.english: CCGG CCGG CCGG Come let's play!

subtitles.original: Yeah, they freaking love us again.
subtitles.english: Yeah, they freaking love us again.

subtitles.original: ...this is sadly the end of the free section.
subtitles.english: ...this is sadly the end of the free section.

subtitles.original: Wait, there's one more song actually. The song after this.
subtitles.english: Wait, there's one more song actually. The song after this.

subtitles.original: Oh, one more song. One more song, sorry, sorry, sorry.
subtitles.english: Oh, one more song. One more song, sorry, sorry, sorry.

subtitles.original: But there's the tickets for the streaming... tickets down below, so please check them out.
subtitles.english: But there's the tickets for the streaming... tickets down below, so please check them out.

subtitles.original: In the description, check out the streaming tickets, okay?
subtitles.english: In the description, check out the streaming tickets, okay?

subtitles.original: AutoThrust forgot to do this today, okay?
subtitles.english: AutoThrust forgot to do this today, okay?

subtitles.original: 無料配信は次の曲で最後になります！
subtitles.english: The free stream will end with the next song!

subtitles.original: ライブの続きはぜひ配信チケットを買って見てね！
subtitles.english: Be sure to get a stream ticket to watch the rest of the show!

subtitles.original: Haters, don't be a freaking loser.
subtitles.english: Haters, don't be a freaking loser.

subtitles.original: Don't hate us for the very last part.
subtitles.english: Don't hate us for the very last part.

subtitles.english: Since this is the very first MC, we want you to be as loud as possible, okay?

responses.thoughts:
**Final Thoughts on the Subtitle Project**

Alright, let's break this down. My goal is to get accurate subtitles for this Hololive EN clip, focusing on Cecilia Immergreen and Gigi Murin. The first task is to transcribe the audio, then translate it when needed. Let's do it right.

I start by meticulously listening to the first section, the song. I zero in on their lyrics, checking and re-checking, making sure I get every word, and the timing down to the millisecond. My focus is on absolute accuracy.

Next comes the instrumental section. Following ZERO GHOST SUBTITLES rule, I'm staying quiet here. However, I note the "Serendipity" logo at 00:51, but the rule applies to relevant text, so I skip it, focusing instead on the audio.

I move into the main section. I pick up the dialogue carefully. I'm focusing on the timing here, ensuring each line has precise timestamps. I capture the introduction, the greetings, and the introduction of their unit name: AutoThrust! I verify the spelling of that, just to be sure. I capture their L.A. call-and-response interactions with the crowd. I make sure I get that American national anthem!

I then listen, and I make sure I get their "CCGG" chants, paying special attention to how Cecilia and Gigi set it up: green vs. orange. I get that the timing is right.

I transcribe their fast chant super carefully, with no errors.

I get the American enthusiasm, and the transition to the ticket promotion. I make sure that the Japanese translation is accurate.

And, as a final touch, I make sure the tone of the final message is perfect.

So there it is: a comprehensive, time-accurate transcription of the video, ready to be translated. I will move on to the actual translation of this dialogue.
